nasb.text: Of Gershon was the family of the Libnites and the family of the Shimeites; these were the families of the Gershonites.

esv.text: To Gershon belonged the clan of the Libnites and the clan of the Shimeites; these were the clans of the Gershonites.

cnv.text: 屬革順的，有立尼家族和示每家族；這是革順人的家族。

ccb.text: 革顺宗族有立尼和示每两个家族，
